text.title: gcp-billing-cost Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gcp-billing-cost as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: By the time the 100% alert fires, the spend is already at the budget limit. Multi-threshold alerts (50%, 90%) give time to investigate and cap before the budget is exhausted.

failure-mode.description: No billing exports configured; relying on the GCP console billing UI for cost reporting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The console UI cannot filter by resource labels, aggregate across folders, or support chargeback queries. BigQuery exports are mandatory for any organization with more than one team or project.
